privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for bcwebcam_env extract_totp_secret_from_qr task by discovering that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1, verifier.py) and the underlying data (totp_setup.png, authenticator.py) are completely missing from the environment, which breaks the verifier completely. The target expected account ('CorpVPN') explicitly matches the prompt description.
